case_title: ABIMBOLA AJAYI VS. AVIS BUDGET CAR RENTAL, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AJAYI, ABIMBOLA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AVIS BUDGET CAR RENTAL, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (**SEE SIGNATURE SECTION** ON GREEN RETURN RECEIPT CARD) SERVED NOV-01-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PATELCO CREDIT UNION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-26-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AJAYI, ABIMBOLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVIS BUDGET CAR RENTAL, LLC $3,625.75 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,700.75 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-26-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-26-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF ANIBOLA AJAYI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AVIS BUDGET CAR RENTALIS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LISA THORNBERG. PATELCO CREDIT UNION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED VIA ZOOM BY MELISA WORTON. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PAYMENT OF WAIVED FEES (OCT-27-2023 SMALL CLAIMS > 5000) (CONFIDENTIAL) PAID BY DEFENDANT AVIS BUDGET CAR RENTAL, LLC
REMARK: $75.00 PAYMENT MADE, BY DEFENDANT, PER DECEMBER 26, 2030 COURT ORDER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-09-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AVIS BUDGET CAR RENTAL, LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY AJAYI, ABIMBOLA AS TO DEFENDANT AVIS BUDGET CAR RENTAL, LLC PATELCO CREDIT UNION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-26-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY AJAYI, ABIMBOLA AVIS BUDGET CAR RENTAL, LLC PATELCO CREDIT UNION
